case_title: INFINITY/LEADER INSURANCE COMPANY VS. GINA GUIAO et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR AUG-20-2003 CONTINUED TO SEP-24-2003 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S) ISIDRO GUIAO. AUG-20-2003 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
